basics.name: Yingjin Li
basics.summary: MPhil student at The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou), working on computer vision, multimodal AI, industrial anomaly detection, and diffusion models.

education.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou)
education.area: Information Hub / Data Science and Analysis
Data Science and Big Data Technology
courses: Big Data Systems and Distributed Processing

publications.name: Fashion Image Retrieval Based on Multimodal Features Enhancement and Fusion
publications.summary: First-author paper on multimodal fashion image retrieval with a focus on visual feature enhancement, multimodal fusion, and robust cross-modal alignment.

portfolio.name: Diffusion-based Industrial Anomaly Detection
portfolio.description: Research on industrial anomaly detection with a focus on diffusion-based reconstruction, semantic conditioning, and robust localization for visual inspection tasks.

portfolio.name: Multimodal Fashion Image Retrieval
portfolio.description: Research on multimodal fashion image retrieval, with an emphasis on visual-semantic alignment and robust retrieval across image-text modalities.

portfolio.name: Multimodal AI for Medical Understanding
portfolio.description: Exploring multimodal AI for medical understanding, including image-text reasoning, visual grounding, and user-oriented intelligent assistance.
